title: morisonia peruviana
intro: Morisonia peruviana, also known as the Peruvian morning glory, is a flowering vine native to the Andean regions of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and depression, improving sleep quality, and providing antioxidant protection. The herbal preparations of Morisonia peruviana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
